name: federated-frontend

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ff/protocol && npm run build -w @ff/host && npm run build -w @ff/plugin-example
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/host/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/plugin-example/tsconfig.json

comment: Force a single copy of the React types: @remote-dom/react depends on @types/react@18, which otherwise collides with the app's v19 types (duplicate ReactNode/Context identities).
